raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es fazziju us teem:
Ko pałihds tas Augstums/ kurp
juhs eetat? Toinehr irr wiżza
Wahrds lihds schodeën nosaukts
tas Augstums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht taffi us Israëta
Nammu: Ta fakka tas Klungs
KUNGS: Effat juhs fagahni-
jschees juhsu Tehwu Zelfös/un
Mauzibu dsinnutchi wiżzu Sa-
gahnifchanahin pakkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teefham/ ar juhsu Dah-
wanu Uppurefchanas/ ka juhs
juhsus Behrnus leełat zaur Ug-
guni cet/ effat juhs apgahnijs-
schees pee wiłkeem juhfeem Sub-
du Deeweem lihds schodeen/ un
es liktohs no jums waizahrt af
Israëta Nams! tik teescham ka
es dshwejn / fakka tas Klungs
KUNGS: Es ne gribbu no jums
waizahts tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir kas jums irr Prahta
nahzis/ tas muhscham ne notiks/
ka juhs gribbetut faazziht: Mehs
turrefinces ka zitti Pagani/ un
ka to Walstu Tantas/ kalpoßim
Rohlam un Akmizam.
Tik teescham ta es dsh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Senimi weddis/ pahr ko es fa-
wu Rohku bju pazehlis win-
neem to doht/ tad suhkoja tee pehz
iklatru augstu Pakalnu/ un pehz
iklatru kaplu Rohku/un uppure-
ja tur sawus Uppureus/ un no-
neffe tur sawus kaitinadamus
Uppureus/ un kivehpınaja tur fa-
wu faldu Smarschu/ un uppu-
reja turpatt sawus Dserkamo-
Uppurus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es isweddischu juhe-
teem Łaudim/ un japulzina-
juhs no tahm Walstim/kurp j
esfat iskaititi/ zaur weenu fi-
ru Rohku/ un tssteepfu Elko-
un zaur isgahstu Bahrsibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es gribbu juhs arrid-
west us to Tuksnesti to Łaus-
un tur teesafchu es ar jums
Waiga prett Waiga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Itt ka es ar juhfeem fi-
ween efimu teefajs Tuksnesti
giptes-Semmê/ tapatt teefa-
es ar jums / fakka tas Kl-
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es likschu juhs
palşch tahs Rihkstes pahr-
gaht/ un weddischu juhs e-
Pinneklem tahs Derribas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es tsmehtischu
Prettiturretajus/ un kas p-
manni no jums pahrkahpj/
isweddischu tohs no tahs S-
mes wiżzu Swechinezib-
un tee ne nahks wairs us J-
etas Semmi/ un juhs fajuttit-
ka es tas KUNGS efimu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhs no Israëta Na-
ma/ ta fakka tas Klungs KUN-
No-eira / kalpojeet ifweens-
weem Suhdu-Deeweem ir-
koscha Laika/ tapehz ka juhs ni-
nis ne gribbat klaufht/ tom-
mannu fivehtu Wahrdu ne-
gabnijeet wairs ar juhsahm
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
